response.justification: Over a decade of full-stack experience with recent TypeScript/Node.js work at re:cinq and Optilyz, plus direct AI-agent infrastructure exposure (MCP code generators), matches the core role requirements. Strong polyglot background, testing/TDD culture, and React+MongoDB+AWS experience align well, though Nest.js and Kotlin are not explicitly evidenced.
strengths: Recent TypeScript/Node.js + React + MongoDB + AWS full-stack delivery
Direct AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling experience
Strong testing/TDD craftsmanship and polyglot breadth
concerns: Kotlin not mentioned in skills or roles
Vitest specifically not called out (testing background skews to other frameworks)

key_factors.factor: Missing Nest.js and Kotlin in stated stack
